# Contact Angle Measurement

**Summary**: A method to determine the wettability of a surface by measuring the angle at which a liquid meets it.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-mohamed|Mohamed, 2024]] used contact angle measurements to evaluate wettability alteration.
